GeoTox 1.0.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • GeoTox Package Data
  • Changelog

Package index

GeoTox

Initialize a GeoTox object.

GeoTox() get_con()
GeoTox S3 object

Wrapper functions

Call a single function for each major step of the workflow. Ordered by workflow sequence.

simulate_population()
Simulate population characteristics and exposures
calc_response()
Calculate concentrations and risks
sensitivity_analysis()
Perform sensitivity analysis

Simulate population

Generate population characteristics and exposures using Monte Carlo simulation.

add_age()
Add age simulation data
add_exposure()
Add exposure simulation data
add_exposure_rate_params()
Add exposure rate simulation data
add_obesity()
Add obesity simulation data
simulate_age()
Simulate age values
simulate_exposure()
Simulate exposure concentrations
simulate_exposure_rate()
Simulate exposure rates
simulate_obesity()
Simulate obesity values

Pre-simulated Css

Set and sample from pre-simulated steady-state plasma concentrations Css.

sample_simulated_css()
Sample from pre-simulated steady-state plasma concentrations
set_fixed_css()
Prepare steady-state plasma concentrations for sensitivity analysis
set_simulated_css()
Set pre-simulated steady-state plasma concentrations

Set ‘sample’ table

Set population characteristics directly instead of simulating them.

set_sample()
Set sample data

Calculate response

Calculate risk scores using population characteristics, exposures, and concentration-response data.

calc_internal_dose()
Calculate internal dose
calc_invitro_concentration()
Calculate in vitro concentration
calc_risk()
Calculate risk scores

Sensitivity analysis

calc_sensitivity()
Calculate risk sensitivity to a single variable

Hill model

add_hill_params()
Add Hill model parameters
fit_hill()
Fit 2- or 3-parameter Hill model

Boundary information

set_boundary() get_boundary()
Store and retrieve boundary geometries

Utility

Extract information from a GeoTox object.

get_assay_table() get_risk_quantiles() get_risk_sensitivity() get_risk_values()
Get risk metric results
get_concentration_mean()
Get concentration mean values

Datasets

geo_tox_data
GeoTox Data

On this page
